**Overview**

This dashboard offers a comprehensive view of insights into the OneDrive Usage in your organization.

The dashboard offers control to filter the data such as Report Refresh Date and User Name. It provides essential metrics such as Active Files Count and total number of accounts. It contains a view of total active accounts per day. It also includes several timeline visualisations such as top accounts with most total files, top accounts with most storage used, and top accounts with most storage allocated.

[**Integrations Page**](/app/integrations/detail/o365/overview)
